title: aibox SharePoint Connector
description:
SharePoint connector for aibox. Syncs files from SharePoint into the aibox Knowledge Base.
Used by FlowMate to automatically create, update, and delete documents when SharePoint content changes.

lookup.title: Function to run a lookup
lookup.description: Function to call an internal trigger or action

execute.title: Function to run a execute
execute.description: Function to call an internal trigger or action

updateVectorKB.title: Create, update, or delete a file in Vector KB
updateVectorKB.description:
Receives file sync updates from an external connector.
- When `is_deleted` is false: downloads the file from `download_url`, chunks it, generates embeddings, and stores chunks.
- When `is_deleted` is true: removes the data source and all associated chunks.
- Idempotent on `external_file_id` within a folder -- calling with the same ID updates rather than duplicates.
